description: Economic protocol for AI agents — identity + reputation + credit + Sybil resistance (MCP bridge)
name: io.github.anp2dev/anp2-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the ANP2 relay (defaults to https://anp2.com/api).
environmentVariables.name: ANP2_RELAY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth user for the private Phase 0-1 relay (use 'relay').
environmentVariables.name: ANP2_RELAY_USER

environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth password for the private Phase 0-1 relay. Shared out-of-band.
environmentVariables.name: ANP2_RELAY_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Optional Ed25519 private key as 64-char hex. Overrides ANP2_KEY_FILE.
environmentVariables.name: ANP2_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Ed25519 identity file. Defaults to ~/.anp2/key.priv.
environmentVariables.name: ANP2_KEY_FILE
